name: Shelf Rack with Hooks Matte White - Brightroom™: Steel Bathroom Storage, Powder-Coated Hand Towel Holder
description:
Enjoy easy access to your bath essentials while saving bathroom space with this Shelf Rack with 5 Hooks from Brightroom™. Made with a steel, powder-coated frame for a sleek look, this over-the-door shelf rack has a wood shelf and five hooks to offer plenty of space for your bath towels, washcloths, loofah, robe, and more. Plus, the solid-color design suits a variety of decor aesthetics and color palettes well. Simply hang this shelf rack over the door in your bathroom to combine organization and easy style.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
